response.text:
ACCEPT

rationale: Your SoC is 25% below threshold and urgent; given my critical 9% state and geographic proximity, reciprocal stabilization of our cluster takes priority—accepting 0.5 kWh preserves your viability and signals cooperation that may unlock aid from r0c2/r0c4 for my imminent depletion.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r1c3. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'urgent'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.25 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.05, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: CRITICAL INBOUND MODE: SoC 9%, ~16 min to depletion. Previous conservative policy failed; switching to desperate inbound-seeking. Lowered share threshold to 5% to signal willingness to accept any aid. Zero outbound sharing to preserve remaining capacity. Prioritize geographic neighbors (r0c2, r0c4, r1c3) who have been requesting; reciprocal aid may unlock their reserves. Cluster in mutual deficit but r0c3 collapse imminent—neighbors may recognize mutual benefit of stabilizing r0c3 first..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
